title: Everbuild Everflex Weather Mate – Gap Filler & Adhesive – Water Resistant – Permanently Flexible – For Exterior Use – Black – 295ml Cartridge (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
SUITABLE FOR ALL ROOFLINE APPLICATIONS – Adheres to all common roofing materials so you can use it to complete jointing or fill cracks in most roofing environments.
ADAPTABLE – Works with a range of materials, including difficult surfaces, so you can use it in conjunction with bitumen, asphalt, lead and galvanised steel.
OVERPAINTABLE – Ideal to fill gaps in and around timber frames that need wood staining or painting, as you can paint over it once dry.
CAN BE APPLIED IN WET WEATHER – Highly waterproof and rain resistant, so you can apply it in any weather, to wet surfaces and even underwater.
VERSATILE – Use it to create an effective lap joint between different materials, such as composite roofs and metal work.
MULTIPLE COLOURS – Also available in White and Translucent shades to give you the finish you prefer.
